output_lean:
theorem blaschke_condition {f : ℂ → ℂ}
  (h_analytic : AnalyticOn ℂ f (Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1))
  (h_bounded : ∃ M : ℝ, ∀ z ∈ Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1, ‖f z‖ ≤ M)
  (h_not_identically_zero : ∃ z ∈ Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1, f z ≠ 0)
  {zeros : ℕ → ℂ}
  (h_zeros_in_disk : ∀ n, zeros n ∈ Metric.ball (0 : ℂ) 1)
  (h_zeros_vals : ∀ n, f (zeros n) = 0)
  : Summable (fun n => 1 - ‖zeros n‖) := sorry
